raw.problem: Data centers reject heat that nearby buildings could use.
raw.opportunity_size: India data-center load ~1GW, growing 25%/yr; heat is free fuel.
raw.why_now: District-heating pilots now permitted in smart cities.
raw.success_scenario: If energy costs rise, heat has a buyer.

structured.tagline: Recycling data-center waste heat to warm buildings and cut emissions.

structured.opportunity_size: India data-center load ~1GW, growing 25%/yr; heat is free fuel.

structured.solution: Heat-as-a-service concept linking data centers to building heating.
